# FactorBeam

> Plain-English AI Literacy for PMs, founders, business leaders, and marketers. Highlight any sentence to get an instant, in-place explanation. Free, no signup.

Logo: /factorbeam-logo-light.png (light mode), /factorbeam-logo-dark.png (dark mode)
Logo mark: /logo-mark.png (transparent icon, no wordmark)
Favicon: /favicon.ico, /favicon-32x32.png
Icon source: /factorbeam-icon-transparent-1024.png
Brand colors: primary #534AB7, secondary #6B5FD4

FactorBeam is a free reading site that teaches how modern AI actually works — written for product managers, founders, business leaders, and marketers rather than ML engineers. Each AI Literacy track is a sequenced set of chapters with three real product examples per concept and a short quiz at the end.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of FactorBeam and AI Literacy.
- [AI Literacy](/ai-literacy): Index of every track in the library — PM, Founder, Business Leader, and Marketer role tracks.
- [About](/about): Why FactorBeam exists and who it's for.

## AI Literacy — Product Manager tracks

- [AI Foundations for PMs](/ai-literacy/pm-foundations/ai-vs-ml-vs-deep-learning): Technical fast-track on models, training vs inference, evaluation, bias and hallucination.
- [LLMs, Models & Prompting](/ai-literacy/pm-llms-prompting/tokenization): Tokenization, transformers and attention, context windows, prompting, fine-tuning vs RAG.
- [Developer Toolchain for PMs](/ai-literacy/pm-dev-toolchain/git-and-github): APIs, Python, notebooks, cloud, containers, CI/CD, and cost/latency tradeoffs.
- [AI Systems Design](/ai-literacy/ai-systems-design/rag-architecture): RAG, vector databases, chunking, reranking, LangChain, fine-tuning, evals, guardrails, observability.
- [AI Infrastructure & Deployment](/ai-literacy/ai-infrastructure-deployment/model-serving-architectures): Serving architectures, GPU vs CPU, batch vs streaming, quantisation, MLOps, deployments.
- [Agents & Multi-agent Systems](/ai-literacy/agents-multi-agent-systems/agent-fundamentals): Tool use, ReAct, memory, LangGraph, multi-agent coordination, MCP, reliability.
- [AI Product Strategy & Decisions](/ai-literacy/ai-product-strategy-decisions/build-buy-fine-tune): Build vs buy, metrics, discovery, data strategy, safety, PRDs, roadmaps.
- [Multimodal & Emerging AI](/ai-literacy/multimodal-emerging-ai/vision-transformers): Vision, diffusion, speech, video, voice interfaces, on-device AI, emerging frontiers.
- [SEO & Content Strategy for AI](/ai-literacy/seo-content-strategy-ai/semantic-seo): Semantic SEO, topic clusters, AI overviews, structured data, entity SEO, AIO.

## AI Literacy — Marketer tracks

- [AI Fundamentals for Marketers](/ai-literacy/ai-fundamentals-for-marketers/mkt-ai-vs-ml-vs-dl-marketer-lens): AI hierarchy, model learning, inference costs, data, evaluation, liability, and martech vendor landscape.
- [AI-Powered Content Strategy](/ai-literacy/ai-powered-content-strategy/mkt-ai-content-generation-fundamentals): Content generation, prompting, brand voice, repurposing, and quality at scale.
- [SEO in the Age of AI](/ai-literacy/seo-in-the-age-of-ai/mkt-ai-restructuring-search): Semantic SEO, AI Overviews, answer-engine optimisation, and AI search visibility.
- [AI for Paid Advertising & Performance Marketing](/ai-literacy/ai-paid-advertising-performance-marketing/mkt-how-ai-runs-ad-platforms): How ad-platform AI works, creative strategy, and attribution in a modeled world.
- [AI Personalisation & Customer Experience](/ai-literacy/ai-personalisation-customer-experience/mkt-personalisation-means-in-ai): Personalisation, recommendations, and email at scale without losing trust.
- [AI Analytics & Marketing Intelligence](/ai-literacy/ai-analytics-marketing-intelligence/mkt-descriptive-to-predictive-analytics): Predictive analytics, CLV, and competitive intelligence for marketing teams.
- [AI for Growth — Acquisition, Retention & Revenue](/ai-literacy/ai-for-growth-acquisition-retention/mkt-ai-growth-funnel): Growth funnel AI, lead scoring, and conversion optimisation.
- [AI Martech Stack & Tool Selection](/ai-literacy/ai-martech-stack-tool-selection/mkt-navigating-ai-martech-landscape): Martech evaluation, integration, and building a coherent AI marketing stack.
